channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Potholes, 4th March
item.description:
A series of two or three rapidly deteriorating potholes have opened up along cattlegate road just after the railway. These are getting bigger daily.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cattlegate Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes on Hurst Lane, 4th March
item.description:
These potholes have been here for several months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I reported this noisy manhole cover over four months ago and still nothing has been done. I will be contacting my local MP., 4th March
item.description:
Too noisy manhole covers opposite 376 Bromley Road been going on for at least five months now and still has not been repaired. This is beyond the joke and keeping me up all night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame dumped, 4th March
item.description:
Dumped outside back of Vestry Road / Nisa

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes within school grounds, 4th March
item.description:
These two extremely deep and large potholes have been here since last year and still not been remedied. Potholes cannot be avoided when driving on the road therefore causing medical issues such as back pain and more.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dorset Road Streetlight not working, 4th March
item.description:
Streetlight not working in front of 7 Dorset Road SW8 1EF It is the only streetlight on the pavement on that side of Dorset Road so it is now very dark at night there. It has stopped working for the last few days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dorset Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outisde no. 21, 4th March
item.description:
The tree died several over a year ago and was cut down and now a large unsightly stump remains. It doesn't appear to be being replanted. Please can it be removed - if it was taken away we'd get at least 2 more parking spaces which we are in desperate need of in a very overcrowded street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spencer Rise, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ship compass play frame has metal post not fixed in place, 4th March
item.description:
One of the metal posts in the spinning ship compass play frame has come out of its fixed place and could cause injury.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Acacia Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp not working, 4th March
item.description:
The street lamp half way up chartwell way se20 is not working. The lamp is out. It is very dark and unsafe to walk up the road in complete darkness
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Chartwell Way, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: You’ve only fixed half a pot hole, 4th March
item.description:
I’m very concerned your contractors have come out and left half a very deep (well over 15cm deep) pothole unreported despite fixing one half. A huge waste of public money. A child tripped here the other week and it’s still not been properly fixed despite multiple reports now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose cover, 4th March
item.description:
Please secure….

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Taplow Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double mattress on pavement, 4th March
item.description:
Large mattress on pavement, leaning against the wall. Seen on 02/03/2026.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Watery Lane, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 4th March
item.description:
Been there weeks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Annesley Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no. 27, 4th March
item.description:
The pothole rocks and makes a noise and has done so for over a year. In addition it is often out of its hole on the pavement (presumably because it is loose) leaving the open hole in the pavement which is dangerous. A neighbour has put tape on it after a recent incident but I needs to be fixed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Jeffrey's Street, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Strong chemical smell, 4th March
item.description:
There has been a strong chemical smell at the northern end of Cranwich Road since Monday 2nd March 2026. It is very strong and smells potentially harmful. I cannot identify what the smell is caused by. From junction with Bergholt Crescent northwards.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cranwich Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bikes, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned Lime bikes on The Point need collecting as have been there for a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maidenstone Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping&unswept for weeks, 4th March
item.description:
No cleaning is being done why?²😂

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned forest bike, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned forest bike that was in the undergrowth has now been brought over the railings by council employees as forest had not responded to repeated requests to recover the bike

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maidenstone Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bellingham station, 4th March
item.description:
Cars are parking to go to Bellingham station on the corner of Brookehowse road 92 the corner and up all the way to the top of road by the church opposite the park where the leisure centre is and parking all day when they travel by train from Bellingham station leaving no space for residents the whole day . This would benefit from restricted parking and residents parking with a few disabled bays . The road is very narrow and diffcult to let down children , elderly and disabled residents which we are experiencing at our residence and Nieghbours alike. It has been a long time issue with many elderly residents finding it difficult getting any help or visits. Buses are running up and down all day and have been struggling also as letting down elderly disabled residents has become a major issue for the buses . We for one need a ramp when letting down our elderly less able mother who has found it difficult getting out and getting visits because of this major issue that has not only become a nuisance but a danger for residents .please could someone from the local authority call us where we can further assist and further explain the difficulties to this road .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brookehowse Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking sign vandelised, 4th March
item.description:
Parking regulation sign outside no15 has been sprayed out black. Residents pay good money to park here, please fix replace ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fielding Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
